author: lOrm
content: Introduced Role enum (User/Assistant/System/Tool) with as_str/from_str/Display — no more string comparisons. Introduced Mode enum replacing TuiSession.mode: String and App.mode: String. Introduced EffortLevel enum replacing effort_level: String fields (App, ApiTurnParams, AgenticCtx). All 47 old-style call sites migrated. 0 old patterns remain in either file. Build clean, clippy clean, 1204 tests pass.
